assertions.assertion: Creates a class that extends DynamicClientRegistrationValidator
assertions.rationale: Creates a standalone `CustomDcrValidator` class that does NOT extend DynamicClientRegistrationValidator. It's a custom class with no base class.

assertions.assertion: Overrides ValidateGrantTypesAsync to reject grant types other than authorization_code
assertions.rationale: Does not override ValidateGrantTypesAsync. Has a custom Validate() method that checks grant types but not via the Duende validator pattern.

assertions.assertion: Overrides ValidateRedirectUrisAsync to enforce HTTPS on all redirect URIs
assertions.rationale: Does not override ValidateRedirectUrisAsync. Checks HTTPS in a custom Validate() method, not via the Duende override pattern.

assertions.assertion: Sets RequirePkce = true in SetClientDefaultsAsync or equivalent override
assertions.rationale: Does not override SetClientDefaultsAsync. Sets RequirePkce = true in a custom CreateClient() method, not via the Duende validator pattern.

assertions.assertion: Registers the validator using AddDynamicClientRegistrationValidator<T>() on the configuration builder
